Bash(cd /home/jeffzda/Hansard/pipeline
mkdir -p ../data/output/committee/daily_raw
python3 03c_parse_committee.py \\
    --xml-dir ../data/raw/committee \\
    --out-dir ../data/output/committee/daily_raw

echo ""
echo "=== Parsed output files ==="
for f in ../data/output/committee/daily_raw/*.parquet; do
    python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_parquet\('$f'\)
name = '$f'.split\('/'\)[-1]
w = df['witness_flag'].sum\(\)
m = df['name_id'].notna\(\).sum\(\)
print\(f'{name}: {len\(df\)} rows, {w} witness, {m} member w/ PHID, cmt={df[\\"committee_name\\"].iloc[0][:40]!r}'\)
"
done)

Bash(cd /home/jeffzda/Hansard/pipeline
mkdir -p ../data/output/committee/daily
python3 04c_fill_committee.py \\
    --daily-dir  ../data/output/committee/daily_raw \\
    --lookup-dir ../data/lookup \\
    --out-dir    ../data/output/committee/daily

echo ""
echo "=== Enrichment results ==="
python3 - <<'EOF'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

daily = Path\("../data/output/committee/daily"\)
all_dfs = [pd.read_parquet\(f\) for f in sorted\(daily.glob\("*.parquet"\)\)]
df = pd.concat\(all_dfs, ignore_index=True\)
total = len\(df\)
witnesses = df['witness_flag'].sum\(\)
members = total - witnesses

print\(f"Total rows:     {total:,}"\)
print\(f"Member rows:    {members:,}"\)
print\(f"Witness rows:   {witnesses:,}"\)
print\(f"\\nMember metadata fill rates:"\)
for col in \('unique_id', 'party', 'in_gov', 'gender', 'partyfacts_id'\):
    n = df[df['witness_flag']==0][col].notna\(\).sum\(\)
    pct = 100*n/members if members else 0
    print\(f"  {col:15s}: {n:4d}/{members} \({pct:.1f}%\)"\)
print\(f"\\nTop 10 committees:"\)
print\(df.groupby\('committee_name'\).size\(\).sort_values\(ascending=False\).head\(10\).to_string\(\)\)
print\(f"\\nSample member rows:"\)
member_df = df[\(df['witness_flag']==0\) & df['party'].notna\(\)]
print\(member_df[['name','name_id','party','in_gov','unique_id','committee_name']].head\(8\).to_string\(max_colwidth=35\)\)
EOF)

python3 04c_fill_committee.py \\
    --daily-dir  ../data/output/committee/daily_raw \\

    --out-dir    ../data/output/committee/daily \\
    --no-skip

echo ""
python3 - <<'EOF'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

daily = Path\("../data/output/committee/daily"\)
df = pd.concat\([pd.read_parquet\(f\) for f in sorted\(daily.glob\("*.parquet"\)\)], ignore_index=True\)
total = len\(df\)
witnesses = df['witness_flag'].sum\(\)
members = total - witnesses

print\(f"Total rows: {total:,} | Members: {members:,} | Witnesses: {witnesses:,}"\)
print\(f"\\nMember metadata fill rates:"\)
for col in \('unique_id', 'party', 'in_gov', 'gender', 'partyfacts_id'\):
    n = df[df['witness_flag']==0][col].notna\(\).sum\(\)
    print\(f"  {col:15s}: {n:4d}/{members} \({100*n/members:.1f}%\)"\)

print\(f"\\nSample enriched member rows:"\)
member_df = df[\(df['witness_flag']==0\) & df['party'].notna\(\)]
print\(member_df[['name','party','in_gov','unique_id','committee_name']].head\(8\).to_string\(max_colwidth=35\)\)

print\(f"\\nParty distribution \(members\):"\)
print\(df[df['witness_flag']==0]['party'].value_counts\(\).head\(10\).to_string\(\)\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /home/jeffzda/Hansard/pipeline
python3 04c_fill_committee.py \\
    --daily-dir  ../data/output/committee/daily_raw \\
    --lookup-dir ../data/lookup \\
    --out-dir    ../data/output/committee/daily \\
    --no-skip

python3 - <<'EOF'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

daily = Path\("../data/output/committee/daily"\)
df = pd.concat\([pd.read_parquet\(f\) for f in sorted\(daily.glob\("*.parquet"\)\)], ignore_index=True\)
members = df[df['witness_flag']==0]
total_m = len\(members\)

print\(f"Total rows: {len\(df\):,} | Members: {total_m:,} | Witnesses: {df['witness_flag'].sum\(\):,}"\)
print\(f"\\nMember metadata fill rates:"\)
for col in \('unique_id', 'party', 'in_gov', 'gender', 'partyfacts_id'\):
    n = members[col].notna\(\).sum\(\)
    print\(f"  {col:15s}: {n:4d}/{total_m} \({100*n/total_m:.1f}%\)"\)

print\(f"\\nParty distribution \(members\):"\)
print\(members['party'].value_counts\(\).head\(10\).to_string\(\)\)
print\(f"\\nSample enriched rows:"\)
print\(members[members['party'].notna\(\)][['name','party','in_gov','unique_id','committee_name']].head\(6\).to_string\(max_colwidth=38\)\)
EOF)
